data.title: Oil Prices Fall As US, Top Israeli Negotiators Plan Meeting In Doha For Gaza Cease-Fire, Hostage Talks
data.description: Oil prices drop 1% amid progress in Gaza ceasefire discussions, as US and Israel convene in Doha. Israel also addresses Hezbollah threat.
